summary: CJ Dropshipping API integration testing complete. All 23 backend tests pass (100%). Tested: search, categories, product detail, import with deduplication, manual sync, sync history, supplier comparison, and daily automation with CJ sync. All endpoints work correctly with live CJ API.
seed_data_creation: Products imported via CJ API during testing are persisted in DB with cj_pid for deduplication
context_for_next_testing_agent: CJ Dropshipping integration fully functional. All endpoints require Bearer token auth except /api/automation/scheduled/daily which uses X-API-Key header (vs_automation_key_2024). CJ API has 1 req/sec rate limit - tests include 1.5s delays between calls. Products are deduplicated by cj_pid field. Sync history shows previous runs in automation_logs collection.

test_results.GET /api/cj/search?q=phone+accessories: PASS - Returns success:true with products array containing cj_pid, product_name, sell_price
test_results.GET /api/cj/search (pagination): PASS - Supports page and page_size parameters
test_results.GET /api/cj/categories: PASS - Returns success:true with categories array containing id and name
test_results.GET /api/cj/product/{pid}: PASS - Returns product detail with cj_pid, product_name, sell_price, variants
test_results.POST /api/cj/import/{pid}: PASS - Imports CJ product, returns product_id and launch_score
test_results.POST /api/cj/import/{pid} (duplicate): PASS - Returns already_existed:true for duplicate import
test_results.POST /api/cj/sync: PASS - Returns fetched/created/skipped counts (takes ~10-30s due to rate limiting)
test_results.GET /api/cj/sync/history: PASS - Returns sync run history with job_name, status, run_time, details
test_results.GET /api/cj/supplier-comparison?q=phone+: PASS - Returns suppliers array with CJ, AliExpress, Zendrop data
test_results.POST /api/automation/scheduled/daily (va: PASS - Returns success:true with cj_sync in response

features_verified: CJ API authentication with access token caching
Product search with pagination and category filtering
Product import with launch score calculation
Supplier comparison across CJ, AliExpress, Zendrop
Daily automation hook includes CJ sync

mocked_apis.CJ Dropshipping: LIVE - All CJ API calls are against the real CJ Dropshipping API (not mocked)

notes: CJ API has 1 request/second rate limit. Tests include delays to avoid rate limiting. The sync endpoint takes 10-30 seconds to complete due to this rate limit.
